规则怪谈降临蓝星。
每个国家都会随机挑选一名天选者进入怪谈世界。
被选中的人，就会背负自己所在国家的命运，他亡国亡。
楚白一觉醒来，竟发现自己变成了可莉，并且还代表龙国进入了怪谈世界。
于是怪谈的画风就变了。
诡异：“那小丫头给我发好人卡也就算了，她还拿炸弹炸我。”
“这小萝莉是来整顿怪谈的吗？”
“夭寿啊，是谁让这个小萝莉进入怪谈的？？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b8214b84a06ce1e56499cd548a07575c","author":"行者有云","author_id":"","book_id":"7234065841728261120","book_name":"规则怪谈：谁选这小萝莉进怪谈的","book_short_name":"可莉怪谈","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6646人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7237126065603215887","read_count":"6646","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"509601"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"242","tags":"悬疑脑洞,系统,穿越,直播,灵异,国运,规则怪谈,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/92fc2ec7b7ce6f66fa02caf6f9ab8e59~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779452211&x-signature=LuFNC%2FBbBOah802SjvKn0Ey%2Bvvw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1345451324903016","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6.396622e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032320165105570FEAFD52377B4D5D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":32,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6396,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":16496},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7250679879149306679","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错的规则怪谈文，虽然我不玩原神，但主角的鲜明特点让人印象深刻，形象饱满，又屑又可爱的可莉真是太棒了。分析规则，规避危险。利用规则，折磨诡异。加上有用的分析组，而且主角虽然有外挂，但外挂使用要先满足条件，还有次数限制，和诡异对抗的情节合理，斗智斗勇，你来我往的场景描写跌宕起伏，扣人心弦，最后有了大杀器，能暴力通关的时候也丝毫不拖泥带水，干脆果断，看的是真的爽。","text_exts":[{"e":8,"s":4,"text":"规则怪谈","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774268211377B4D5D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227250679879149306679%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227234065841728261120%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1688180541,"group_id":"7234065841728261120","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx1zAHcq0JIEGRZUS0MtK/a7158hC0CddQhrWxdOd/75","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b6b067cd671c4641bbfab13dfb065a90~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790985&x-signature=FWOnP%2Bb%2F5RVUPIOjE74UXNmSG4s%3D","user_id":"1746480105785119","user_name":"爱吃芝士焗蟹的齐振国"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"17
